checkMaxCharLength.title: Warn if a target is longer than the given percentage of the character length of its source
checkMaxCharLength.description: Flag target text longer than a given percentage of source character length.

maxCharLengthBreak.title: Character length above which a text is considered "long"
maxCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered long for max length checking.

maxCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for "long" text
maxCharLengthAbove.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for long text.

maxCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for "short" text
maxCharLengthBelow.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for short text.

checkMinCharLength.title: Warn if a target is shorter than the given percentage of the character length of its source
checkMinCharLength.description: Flag target text shorter than a given percentage of source character length.

minCharLengthBreak.title: Character length above which a text is considered "long"
minCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered long for min length checking.

minCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for "long" text
minCharLengthAbove.description: Minimum allowed percentage of source length for long text.

minCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for "short" text
minCharLengthBelow.description: Minimum allowed percentage of source length for short text.

checkStorageSize.title: Warn if a source or target text unit does not fit its ITS Storage Size property
checkStorageSize.description: Verify byte storage size of target text against ITS limits.

checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.title: Warn if a target is longer than
checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.description: Flag target text exceeding an absolute maximum character count.

absoluteMaxCharLength.title: Absolute Maximum Character Length
absoluteMaxCharLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in target text, regardless of source length.
